sql_array: CREATE TABLE T1 (id INT, json_data JSON, key_part1 VARCHAR(255), key_part2 INT, PRIMARY KEY(id));
INSERT INTO T1 (id, json_data, key_part1, key_part2) VALUES (1, '["value1", "value2"]', 'Key1', 123);
INSERT INTO T1 (id, json_data, key_part1, key_part2) VALUES (2, '["value3", "value4"]', 'Key2', NULL);
INSERT INTO T1 (id, json_data, key_part1, key_part2) VALUES (3, '["value5"]', 'Key1', 456);
INSERT INTO T1 (id, json_data, key_part1, key_part2) VALUES (4, '["value6", "value7"]', 'Key2', 789);
SELECT key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', 'key_part1', json_array_length(json_data)) AS estimate_count FROM T1 WHERE key_part2 IS NOT NULL;

SELECT A.id, key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', A.key_part1, A.key_part2) AS key_estimate_val, json_array_length(B.json_data) AS json_length FROM T1 AS A JOIN T1 AS B ON A.key_part2 = B.key_part2 WHERE A.id < 3 GROUP BY A.id ORDER BY key_estimate_val DESC;
SELECT key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', 'Key1', -1) AS estimate_error, json_array_length(json_data) FROM T1 WHERE key_part1 IS NOT NULL HAVING json_array_length(json_data) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', 'Key2', key_part2) AS estimate_key_2 FROM T1 WHERE json_array_length(json_data) = 2;
SELECT key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', key_part1, NULLIF(key_part2, 0)) AS adjusted_estimate FROM T1 WHERE key_part2 IS NOT NULL OR key_part1 = '';
SELECT key_estimate('DB.DBA.T1', 'InvalidKey', null) FROM T1 WHERE JSON_LENGTH(json_data) > 0 AND key_part1 IN (SELECT key_part1 FROM T1 WHERE key_part2 > 100) LIMIT 1;
